name: showLessonPhase
description: Notify BiteCode that the lesson entered one fixed workflow phase after introduction. BiteCode automatically starts at Introduction, so never call this tool for introduction. When previous lesson review is active, send calibration only after both review questions have been answered and received feedback. BiteCode owns the order, total, label, and safely defers premature calibration events.

parameters.description: Fixed later-phase identifier. Use exactly one of: previous_lesson_review, calibration, main_lesson, knowledge_check, session_wrap_up. Never send introduction.
